title: heteropappus linearifolius
intro: Heteropappus linearifolius, also known as the linearleaf creosote bush, is a shrub-like plant native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues. Heteropappus linearifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
